summary: Tested new features: LineupManagerDrawer surfboards visual, PhotographerSessionManager component, and backend POST /api/bookings/{id}/lineup/status endpoint. All features working correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features tested and working: (1) LineupManagerDrawer displays colored surfboards underneath avatars - yellow for captain (position 0), cyan/pink/purple for crew (positions 1+), (2) Empty seats show ghosted surfboard outlines with dashed borders and '+' icons with 'Open #N' labels and 'Paddle Out' badges, (3) No scrollbar flickering - overflow-hidden applied to visual lineup container with comment 'No animation to prevent scrollbar flicker', (4) PhotographerSessionManager component exists with session status toggle (open/closed), participant list with surfboard avatars, 'Lock & Finalize' and 'Cancel & Refund' buttons, (5) Backend POST /api/bookings/{id}/lineup/status endpoint works correctly for toggling status between 'open' and 'closed' - all 6 pytest tests pass.

details: SURFBOARD_COLORS array defined with 7 colors: Yellow (captain), Cyan, Pink, Purple, Green, Orange, Blue
SurferPosition component renders SVG surfboard underneath avatar with correct color based on position
Captain (position 0) gets yellow surfboard (#FCD34D fill, #F59E0B stroke)
Crew members get cyan/pink/purple surfboards based on position index
Surfboard SVG includes: ellipse shape, stringer line, nose detail, fin
Visual confirmed in screenshot: Captain 'T' with yellow board, crew 'Test' with cyan board
EmptySeat component renders ghosted surfboard outline with dashed stroke
Empty board colors are desaturated: Slate, Gray, Cool gray
Plus icon (+) displayed in center of empty seat circle
'Open #N' label shown below empty seat
'Paddle Out' badge displayed for empty seats
Visual confirmed in screenshot: 'Open #3' and 'Open #4' with ghosted boards and + icons
Visual lineup container has overflow-hidden class
Comment in code: 'No animation to prevent scrollbar flicker'
minHeight: 280px set on container to prevent layout shifts
No CSS animations on the lineup visual that could cause overflow
'Lock Lineup & Confirm Session' button present (green gradient, data-testid='lock-lineup-btn')
'Close to New' button present (amber outline, data-testid='close-to-invites-btn')
'Cancel & Refund' button present (red outline, data-testid='cancel-all-btn')
All buttons visible in screenshot
Component exists at /app/frontend/src/components/PhotographerSessionManager.js
Imported and rendered in PhotographerBookingsManager.js
'Manage Session' button added to confirmed bookings (data-testid='manage-session-btn-{id}')
Session status toggle (open/closed) with Switch component
ParticipantCard component shows surfboard avatars with SURFBOARD_COLORS
'Lock & Finalize' button (data-testid='lock-session-btn')
'Cancel & Refund' button (data-testid='cancel-session-btn')
Tabs: 'Surfers', 'Invite', 'Controls'
POST /api/bookings/{id}/lineup/status endpoint exists
Accepts body: {status: 'open'|'closed'}
Returns: {message, booking_id, lineup_status, allow_splitting}
Validates status must be 'open' or 'closed'
Only captain or photographer can change status (403 for unauthorized)
Returns 404 for nonexistent booking
All 6 pytest tests pass
